# PHImageRequestID

**Type Alias**

A numeric identifier for an asynchronous image request.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias PHImageRequestID = Int32
```

## Discussion

Pass this identifier to the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/cancelImageRequest(_:)] method if you need to cancel a request before it completes.

## Canceling a Request

- **cancelImageRequest(_:)**: Cancels an asynchronous request
- **PHInvalidImageRequestID**: A special value provided for asynchronous image requests that cannot be canceled.
